## What changed?

Describe the focused change and the user-visible result.

## Why is this change needed?

Explain the observed problem, root cause, or documented use case.

## Related issue

Closes #

- DeepSeek App channel:

- Module scope:

## Compatibility impact

- Does this modify Hook behavior? Yes / No
- Does this modify module scope? Yes / No
- Does this affect mainland/Google Play/Legacy compatibility? Explain:
- Does this add or update a dependency? Explain:

## Verification

Describe the tests performed, their results, and any untested paths.

## Screenshots or redacted logs

Attach only material needed to review the change. Remove tokens, cookies, account information, email addresses, phone numbers, device identifiers, private server addresses, prompts, responses, signed URLs, and other private data.

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md was updated when user-facing behavior or compatibility changed
- [ ] README_CN.md was updated when user-facing behavior or compatibility changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md was updated when the change belongs in release notes
- [ ] No documentation update is needed, and the reason is explained above

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I did not commit tokens, cookies, account data, private keys, signing files, or other credentials
- [ ] I did not commit local absolute paths or private server addresses
- [ ] I did not commit unrelated APKs, databases, logs, generated output, or other large files
- [ ] I tested the primary affected behavior and described the result
- [ ] I stated the exact compatible DeepSeek channel, version, and `versionCode`
- [ ] I kept the existing package name, application ID, namespace, signing behavior, and module scope unless the PR explicitly discusses an authorized change
